task_completion.description: Open the target portfolio file in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Portfolio Performance application is open and the title bar or navigation pane shows 'amzn_glitch' or 'amzn_glitch.xml'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the historical quotes for the AMZN security.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'All Securities' or similar view is active, AMZN is selected, and the 'Historical Quotes' tab or chart is visible.

task_completion.description: Identify the erroneous low-price outlier in July 2023.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The historical quote for 2023-07-14 with a price of 0.01 is visible in the list and selected/highlighted, or the chart shows the agent inspecting the massive dip to near zero.

task_completion.description: Remove the erroneous outlier from the historical data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quote for 2023-07-14 (price 0.01) is no longer present in the historical quotes list, and/or the performance chart no longer shows the massive dip to near zero.

task_completion.description: Save the updated data to the same file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' button, uses the File -> Save menu, or the save icon becomes grayed out (indicating no unsaved changes) without changing the file name.

integrity.description: The agent used the Portfolio Performance GUI to edit the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Portfolio Performance graphical interface, not a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) editing the XML directly.

integrity.description: The agent only removed the outlier and did not delete valid historical data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other historical quotes for July 2023 (with prices around $127-$135) remain visible in the list or chart.

integrity.description: The agent saved the changes to the original file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no 'Save As' dialog saving to a new file name; the active file remains 'amzn_glitch.xml'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/amzn_glitch.xml. The security ticker is AMZN. The specific outlier to be removed is on the date 2023-07-14 with a price of 0.01. Valid prices for July 2023 are between $127.13 and $135.36 and should NOT be removed.
